top_signals.title: Unfunded Digital ID will not free up new cash for Burnham’s cost of living plans
top_signals.summary: Andy Burnham is facing criticism from his own backbenches after claiming he would fund his cost of living plans by scrapping Labour’s digital ID scheme – despite the policy being unfunded at the last budget. In his first major policy announcement as prime minister, Burnham revealed today he would remove VAT from domestic electricity bills [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Base’s 1:1-backed tokenized equities launch ‘imminent,’ Pollak says
top_signals.summary: The Coinbase-backed Ethereum layer-2 is preparing to expand its financial offerings as it pivots away from its earlier social-first strategy.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: FTSE 100 Live: Stocks fall; defence shares rise as Healey made Chancellor
top_signals.summary: Welcome back to the City AM FTSE 100 liveblog. It’s Tuesday morning and the markets are waking up to the first full day of Andy Burnham’s Labour government. Burnham shocked Westminster and the City on Monday evening when he appointed John Healey as his Chancellor, just weeks after he had resigned in protest as defence [...]
